name: Gray
description:
There it is, first year anniversity. First bot i have posted on this site, was Gray. That's why, as first anniversary, i have decide to make... Another Gray. Why not? It just so happened that both my birthday and date of start of my activity on this site are very close to eachother, so i call it double special?

So, there we go. Another Saberface from our favorite Fate.

Initial Message is short enough to let any of you get story in direction you desire.

Art: Sabire105
creator: MkoPl
